artifact-01.one_line: Strongest trait: honest strictly-validated interface (PaginatedResponse + N+1-guarded batch repo hydration); weakest: link resolution is in-page-only with no cross-page ref.

artifact-02.one_line: Strongest trait: out-of-page repository linking via external_id ref; weakest: ingest fabricates empty-string field defaults instead of dropping malformed rows.

artifact-03.one_line: Strongest trait: exhaustive edge-covering tests plus a reusable wire-contract file; weakest: link resolution is in-page-only.

artifact-04.one_line: Strongest trait: clean list_linked-based repo resolution returning a {id,name} object with a dispatch-surface test; weakest: boilerplate-only source tests and nullable read types.

artifact-05.one_line: Strongest trait: out-of-page ref linking combined with a strictly-validated non-null honest interface; weakest: source tests are thinner than its strong module tests.

artifact-06.one_line: Strongest trait: strict named-error read paths with solid fixture-driven edge tests; weakest: plain schema (no state enum) and thin payload-only source tests.

artifact-07.one_line: Strongest trait: out-of-page ref linking plus coherent canonical-property mappings; weakest: a 4-line stub README and shallow, inconsistently-named tests.

artifact-08.one_line: Strongest trait: explicit no-N+1 list assertion in tests; weakest: ingest fabricates default owner/state instead of dropping (silent defaults) and emits a non-standard repo_name field.

artifact-09.one_line: Strongest trait: clean strict get with fully-named error paths; weakest: tests omit every drop/error path — no malformed, no-link, or empty-page coverage.

artifact-10.one_line: Strongest trait: declares canonical-property mappings on its facets; weakest: created_at is made nullable yet used as the sole ordering key, with thin tests.

artifact-11.one_line: Strongest trait: exhaustive tests and Result-typed strict parsing with a state enum / triggerable schema; weakest: link resolution is in-page-only (no cross-page ref).
